creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 214391
patch to update math/saga from 7.6.2 to 7.6.3

This patch towards SAGA GIS version 7.6.3 brings some bug fixes and enhancements[1]:
 
- bug fix in statistics_kriging/variogram_dialog
- omp issue with compiling proj<6
- bug fix for export of grid to kml
- check gcc version for wksp_tool_manager
- add russian translation
- ...

[1] https://sourceforge.net/p/saga-gis/wiki/Changelog%207.6.3/attachment/changelog_saga_7.6.3.txt


Tested with Poudriere (F11.3i/a, F12.1i/a, and HEADi/a).

'portlint -AC' seems happy.
